entity.label: Apelles
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Christian at Rome whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:10), and styles “approved in Christ.”

nodes.label: Apelles
nodes.description: A Christian at Rome whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:10), and styles “approved in Christ.”

verses.text: Salute Apelles approved in Christ. Salute them which are of Aristobulus’ household.
